commit.message:
fix(model-3d): fix face splitting — snap line to plane + use triangle lookup

Three fixes for face splitting:
1. Snap line endpoints onto face plane before 2D projection (fixes
   floating-point errors from matrixWorld.invert() causing missed
   intersections)
2. Use triangleToHEFace for O(1) face lookup instead of findFaceAtPoint
   (avoids point-in-polygon edge cases at vertices/edges)
3. Include updatedAt in edge geometry key so edges re-render after splits

commit.message:
config: disable RL orchestrator, use SimpleOrchestrator with static weights

orchestrator.rl.enabled: true → false
SimpleOrchestrator selects top_k=3 strategies by static strategy_weights
(deterministic, no LSTM) and passes weights to vote-mode _combine_signals().

commit.message:
fix: run all code 355 scripts in condition VM, fix window=globalObject

Previous fix only handled window.* scripts; keyTemp++ was silently
dropped, causing CE 154's keyList loop to run infinitely (keyTemp
never incremented → break condition never met).

Changes:
- Best-effort execute ALL unmatched code 355 scripts in condition VM
  (errors silently ignored). Handles keyTemp++, window.keyTemp=0, etc.
- Use vm.RunString() for keyList/keyTemp init instead of vm.NewArray()
  (ensures proper JS Array with working .length property)
- Set window = vm.GlobalObject() so window.x === x (matches browser JS)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Adds 53 new translation keys (128→181 total), en/ja parity verified.

Add GitHub star prompt on exit using gh CLI

Checks if gh is installed and authenticated, then checks if the repo
is already starred. If not, prompts user with (y/n) to star it.
Silently skips if gh is unavailable or any error occurs.

commit.message:
Expand R2DBC test coverage to multiple database dialects (#24)

* Expand R2DBC test coverage to multiple database dialects

Refactor R2DBC tests from Postgres-only to a multi-dialect test framework supporting
H2, PostgreSQL, MySQL, MariaDB, MSSQL, and Oracle. Introduces a `R2dbcTestDialect`
abstraction and reusable test factories (basicInsertQueryTests, transactionTests,
dataTypeTests) to run the same test suite against each database via Testcontainers.

Also fixes R2dbcTransaction to create a new statement per parameter set and uses
flatMapConcat for proper result stream handling. Column names are now lowercased
for cross-database compatibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix connection pool exhaustion by closing connections after use

The connection was never returned to the pool in the finally block of
suspendingTransaction, causing hangs once the pool was exhausted.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix postgres tests

---------

commit.message:
fix: increase TikZ pipeline timeout from 20s to 40s for forced pipeline

When diagramMode='quick' forces TikZ pipeline, there's no fallback
pipeline to run. The previous 20s per-pipeline timeout was designed
for primary+fallback scenarios (20s each = 40s total), but cut off
the single TikZ pipeline before it could finish.

TikZ pipeline = Claude API (~10-15s) + QuickLaTeX (~5-10s) = 15-25s
typical. With network jitter, 20s was too tight.

Now: forced pipeline gets 40s, unfixed pipeline keeps 20s (with
fallback getting its own 20s).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Migrate from hand-rolled TWS protocol to ibapi crate

Replace ~1250 lines of manual IB TWS binary protocol code (TwsClient,

minor async updates. Delete src/tws/messages.rs entirely.

commit.message:
fix(analytics): add $ai_trace_id to PostHog $ai_generation events (#143)

The PostHog LLM Analytics dashboard's Traces, Generative AI users, and
Cost per user insights were showing "no matching events" because
$ai_generation events lacked the $ai_trace_id property needed to group
events into traces.

- Generate a UUID trace ID per user request (message, heartbeat,
  scheduled task)
- Propagate trace ID through all analytics pathways: usageHandler,
  deepReasoning tool, generateImage tool, and ProWrite pipeline
- Add clearTraceId() cleanup in finally blocks to prevent stale IDs
  across isolate reuses

commit.message:
Replace Dialog-based fullscreen viewer with simple fixed overlay

The Radix Dialog component was causing image overflow/cropping due to
its internal positioning and transform styles. Replace with a plain
fixed div overlay that uses a simple flex column layout: top bar with
counter + close button, flex-1 image area with object-contain, and
bottom thumbnail strip. Click outside the image dismisses the viewer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: excludeGlobs filtering in capture pipeline

Test-PathMatchesExcludeGlobs now handles ** glob patterns (e.g.,
**\VEN_*, **\*.log, **\Cache\**) by normalizing separators and matching
against path segments instead of relying on -like which doesn't expand
** as recursive wildcard. Both Invoke-CollectConfigFiles and
Invoke-ConfigModuleCapture now prune excluded files after Copy-Item
-Recurse for directory sources, preventing hardware-specific configs
like MSI Afterburner VEN_* profiles from leaking into capture bundles.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
test(api): add 41 unit test files — coverage 82% → 95%

New test coverage across 13 modules:
- Loyalty (quest, achievement, referral, promo-code)
- Auth (token-blacklist, cookie, password-policy)
- Transactions (create, query, reconcile)
- Inventory (transfer, adjustment)
- Warehouse (stock-take, stock-reservation, inventory-batch)
- Employees (6 HR services)
- Reports (analytics, report-generator, excel-export)
- Import (validator, template, session, parser)
- Directories (source, entry, audit)
- Contractors (contract, commission)
- Other (alerts, geocoding, route-optimization, data-validation,
  recipe-consumption, gps-processing, trip-reconciliation)

Also: update global-error.tsx TODO → actionable Sentry comment

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add TUI + Web UI, fix heartbeat, add stop/start, drop chat.py

- Add nutshell/ui/tui.py: Textual TUI with split-panel layout (chat,
  kanban, instance list, status bar), /stop /start commands
- Add nutshell/ui/web.py: FastAPI + SSE web UI with stop/start API
- Fix heartbeat timing bug: last_tick_time now reset after tick
  completes, not before — prevents back-to-back triggers
- Add instance stop/start: manifest status field, is_stopped(),
  set_status(); user message always wakes a stopped instance
- Remove chat.py and nutshell-chat entry point
- Rewrite README: full system lifecycle, entity-file agent creation guide
